# Good First Issues — Drafts

This directory contains drafted `good first issue` stubs that are **not yet posted** on GitHub. Each file is a small, well-scoped task (~15–30 min) suitable for a new contributor.

When promoting one to a real GitHub issue:
1. Open a new issue using the **Feature Request** or **Bug Report** template.
2. Paste the body from the corresponding `.md` file here.
3. Add labels: `good first issue`, plus the suggested type label (`bug`, `enhancement`, `documentation`).
4. Delete the corresponding draft file in the same PR.

## Index

| # | Title | Type | Est |
|---|---|---|---|
| 01 | Add `--version` flag to CLI | enhancement | 15m |
| 02 | Fix typos in README quickstart | documentation | 15m |
| 03 | Add empty-state illustration to DraftsPage | enhancement | 30m |
| 04 | Replace inline hex colors with Tailwind tokens in `KnowledgeStats` | enhancement | 30m |
| 05 | Add favicon to frontend | enhancement | 15m |
| 06 | Document `~/.coco/` directory layout | documentation | 30m |
| 07 | Add `prefers-reduced-motion` guard to wiki animations | enhancement | 20m |
| 08 | Add `aria-label` to icon-only buttons in sidebar | enhancement | 20m |
| 09 | Surface CLI exit codes in README | documentation | 15m |
| 10 | Add loading skeleton to `BrainPage` | enhancement | 30m |
| 11 | Lint: enable `no-console` in frontend eslint config | enhancement | 20m |
| 12 | Add `.editorconfig` to repo root | enhancement | 15m |
